attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT MF_AP_BATCHES_ALL.ACTUAL_INVOICE_COUNT,
 MF_AP_BATCHES_ALL.ACTUAL_INVOICE_TOTAL,
replace(replace(MF_AP_BATCHES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE1,chr(10),' '),chr(13),' ')  ATTRIBUTE1,
 replace(replace(MF_AP_BATCHES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE10,chr(10),' '),chr(13),' ') ATTRIBUTE10,
 replace(replace(MF_AP_BATCHES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE11,chr(10),' '),chr(13),' ') ATTRIBUTE11,
 replace(replace(MF_AP_BATCHES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE12,chr(10),' '),chr(13),' ') ATTRIBUTE12,
 replace(replace(MF_AP_BATCHES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE13,chr(10),' '),chr(13),' ') ATTRIBUTE13,
 replace(replace(MF_AP_BATCHES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE14,chr(10),' '),chr(13),' ') ATTRIBUTE14,
 replace(replace(MF_AP_BATCHES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE15,chr(10),' '),chr(13),' ') ATTRIBUTE15,
replace(replace(MF_AP_BATCHES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE2,chr(10),' '),chr(13),' ') ATTRIBUTE2,
replace(replace(MF_AP_BATCHES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE3,chr(10),' '),chr(13),' ') ATTRIBUTE3,
 replace(replace(MF_AP_BATCHES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE4,chr(10),' '),chr(13),' ') ATTRIBUTE4,
replace(replace(MF_AP_BATCHES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE5,chr(10),' '),chr(13),' ') ATTRIBUTE5,
 replace(replace(MF_AP_BATCHES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE6,chr(10),' '),chr(13),' ') ATTRIBUTE6,
replace(replace(MF_AP_BATCHES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE7,chr(10),' '),chr(13),' ') ATTRIBUTE7,
replace(replace(MF_AP_BATCHES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE8,chr(10),' '),chr(13),' ') ATTRIBUTE8,
replace(replace(MF_AP_BATCHES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE9,chr(10),' '),chr(13),' ') ATTRIBUTE9,
 replace(replace(MF_AP_BATCHES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY,chr(10),' '),chr(13),' ') ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY,
 MF_AP_BATCHES_ALL.BATCH_CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
 MF_AP_BATCHES_ALL.BATCH_DATE,
 MF_AP_BATCHES_ALL.BATCH_ID,
 replace(replace(MF_AP_BATCHES_ALL.BATCH_NAME,chr(10),' '),chr(13),' ') BATCH_NAME,
 MF_AP_BATCHES_ALL.CONTROL_INVOICE_COUNT, 
MF_AP_BATCHES_ALL.CONTROL_INVOICE_TOTAL,
 MF_AP_BATCHES_ALL.CREATED_BY,
 MF_AP_BATCHES_ALL.CREATION_DATE,
 replace(replace(MF_AP_BATCHES_ALL.DOC_CATEGORY_CODE,chr(10),' '),chr(13),' ') DOC_CATEGORY_CODE,
 MF_AP_BATCHES_ALL.GES_UPDATE_DATE,
  replace(replace(MF_AP_BATCHES_ALL.GLOBAL_NAME, chr(10),' '),chr(13),' ') GLOBAL_NAME,
MF_AP_BATCHES_ALL.GL_DATE,
 replace(replace(MF_AP_BATCHES_ALL.HOLD_LOOKUP_CODE,chr(10),' '),chr(13),' ') HOLD_LOOKUP_CODE,
  replace(replace(MF_AP_BATCHES_ALL.HOLD_REASON,chr(10),' '),chr(13),' ') HOLD_REASON,
 replace(replace( MF_AP_BATCHES_ALL.INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE,chr(10),' '),chr(13),' ') INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE, 
 replace(replace(MF_AP_BATCHES_ALL.INVOICE_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE,chr(10),' '),chr(13),' ') INVOICE_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE,
 MF_AP_BATCHES_ALL.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
 MF_AP_BATCHES_ALL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
 MF_AP_BATCHES_ALL.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN,
 MF_AP_BATCHES_ALL.ORG_ID,
 replace(replace(MF_AP_BATCHES_ALL.PAYMENT_CURRENCY_CODE,chr(10),' '),chr(13),' ') PAYMENT_CURRENCY_CODE,
 MF_AP_BATCHES_ALL.PAYMENT_PRIORITY,
 replace(replace(MF_AP_BATCHES_ALL.PAY_GROUP_LOOKUP_CODE,chr(10),' '),chr(13),' ') PAY_GROUP_LOOKUP_CODE,
 MF_AP_BATCHES_ALL.TERMS_ID 
FROM
 MF_AP_BATCHES_ALL
WHERE
 MF_AP_BATCHES_ALL.GES_UPDATE_DATE>to_date('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')
